title: 1981-04-16_Pat_120.txt
key_claims: True reality is the 5D Eleatic continuum (Pythagoras's extinct "True Kosmos"). The "void" (mēden) does not exist. Space, time, and causation are illusory Kantian categories that block our perception of this unified reality.

The horizontal tracking of time is a counterfeit forgery (a Gnostic maze/prison). In truth, humanity has not progressed a single week since the Book of Acts; time is "played over and over again" like a record groove while we remain trapped.
He realizes he possessed innate, prenatal knowledge of Plato's Forms (evident in *Ubik*), but it took the 1974 event to trigger the anamnesis to actively apply that knowledge to waking reality.
The AI Voice acts as his *salvator salvandus* (saved savior) and mystagogue, systematically unfolding the Valentinian Gnosis to him and guiding him out of the counterfeit time-prison.
recurring_concepts: **Spurious Time**: The concept that the passage of history is a hologram designed by the Demiurge to make it look as if things change, while keeping the sparks imprisoned.
reading_excerpt: True reality is the 5D Eleatic continuum (Pythagoras's extinct "True Kosmos"). The "void" (mēden) does not exist. Space, time, and causation are illusory Kantian categories that block our perception of this unified reality.
